## Verification

<!-- List exact commands, environment, results, and skipped checks. -->

- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] Synthetic smoke comparison run when model/pipeline behavior changed
- [ ] Reproducibility evidence included for benchmark changes
- [ ] Documentation updated where needed
